title: Craftable Red Sand│可合成紅沙
description: Added Red Sand recipe.│添加了紅沙配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Place red dye in the middle and surround it with sand to dye all the sand red, just like dyeing terracotta.│將紅色染料放在中間，四周圍上沙子可將沙子全數染成紅沙，就和染陶瓦一樣。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
